---
title: "Alumni & Collaborators"
description: "Affiliated members, close collaborators, and the alumni and former colleagues of the CompOmics group at Ghent University and VIB."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero-band">
  <img class="page-hero-img" src="../assets/frames/bg-2.jpg" alt="">
  <div class="page-hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="page-hero-content">
    <div class="page-hero-kicker">People</div>
    <h1 class="page-hero-title">Alumni &amp; Collaborators</h1>
    <p class="page-hero-sub">The affiliated members, close collaborators, and former colleagues who have shaped CompOmics over the years.</p>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function () {
  function alignHero() {
    var ref = document.querySelector('.team-section-title');
    var content = document.querySelector('.page-hero-content');
    var band = document.querySelector('.page-hero-band');
    if (!ref || !content || !band) return;
    var offset = ref.getBoundingClientRect().left - band.getBoundingClientRect().left;
    content.style.paddingLeft = Math.max(16, offset) + 'px';
  }
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', alignHero);
  window.addEventListener('resize', alignHero);
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<section class="team-shell">
  <div class="team-shell-intro">

  <h3 class="team-section-title">Affiliated Members</h3>
  <div class="network-chips network-chips-wide">
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Christophe Vanderaa</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">Clement group, UGent, Belgium</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 class="team-section-title">Close Collaborators</h3>
  <div class="network-chips network-chips-wide">
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Harald Barsnes</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">University of Bergen, Norway</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Marie Brunet</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">Université de Sherbrooke, Canada</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Christine Carapito</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">Université de Strasbourg, France</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Lieven Clement</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">UGent, Belgium</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Maarten Dhaenens</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">UGent, Belgium</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Bart Mesuere</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">UGent, Belgium</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Thilo Muth</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">Robert Koch Institute, Berlin, Germany</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Magnus Palmblad</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">LUMC, The Netherlands</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Marc Vaudel</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">University of Bergen, Norway</span>
    </div>
    <div class="network-chip">
      <span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Wim Vranken</span>
      <span class="network-chip-meta">VUB, Belgium</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 class="team-section-title">Alumni &amp; Former Colleagues</h3>
  <div class="network-chips">
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Andrea Argentini</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Niklaas Colaert</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Sven Degroeve</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Nina Demeulemeester</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Joe Foster</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Giulia Gonnelli</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Surya Gupta</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Kenny Helsens</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Tanja Holstein</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Paola Masuzzo</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Sami Naji</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Elvis Ndah</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Gwendolien Sergeant</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Ana Silvia C. Silva</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Elien Vandermarliere</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Kenneth Verheggen</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Tessa Vermeire</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Pieter-Jan Volders</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Dr. Şule Yılmaz</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Genet Abay Shiferaw</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Iain Buchanan</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Nicolas Housset</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Niels Hulstaert</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Pieter Kelchtermans</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Davy Maddelein</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Jonas Segaert</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Adriaan Sticker</span></span>
    <span class="network-chip"><span class="network-chip-name">Demet Turan</span></span>
  </div>

  <div class="team-network-cta">
    <a href="index.html" class="network-btn network-btn-ghost"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left" aria-hidden="true"></i> Back to the team</a>
  </div>

  </div>
</section>
```
